reference: I have severe fibromyalgia symptoms. I know it causes weight gain, which I have struggled with my whole life. I need information on prescribed weight loss pills to assist in reducing my pain. I fired my doctor as she refused to help me with weight loss medication.
text: I have severe fibromyalgia symptoms; I know it causes weight gain, which I have struggled with my whole life. I need information on prescribed weight-loss pills to assist in reducing my pain. I fired my doctor; she refused to help me with weight-loss medication.
